10.reason: [Pushing without checking stack overflow (max capacity is 100, but i can exceed 100)]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Pushes without checking stack overflow; stack capacity is 100 but index i can go beyond 100]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Pushes value into stack but does not check for stack overflow (max capacity is 100). If i reaches 101, it writes beyond array bounds.]

12.reason: [Incorrect way to check if stack is empty; should check index i <= 0 instead of comparing value to '\0']

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect way to check if stack is empty; should check index i <= 0 instead of comparing value to '\0']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect way to check if stack is empty; 'i' points to next available slot, and stack elements are not null-terminated]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect way to check if stack is empty. The stack uses integer values; uninitialized or popped elements are not guaranteed to be '\0'. Should check index i <= 0 instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect way to check if stack is empty. Stack elements are integers, not strings; s[i] is uninitialized or invalid when i==0. Should check i <= 0 instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect way to check if stack is empty. The stack pointer i should be checked against 0, not the value at s[i]. Also, s[i] may contain any integer, not necessarily '\0'.]

15.reason: [Printing address of array element instead of the value; should be s[--i] or s[i-1] with proper index handling]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Printing address of array element instead of the value; should be s[--i] or s[i-1] with proper index handling]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Printing address of s[i] instead of value; should be s[i-1] or adjust index before printing]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Printing address of s[i] using & instead of the value. Should print s[i-1] before decrementing, or adjust logic to access correct top element. Also, i-- after accessing wrong index.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Printing address of s[i] instead of its value. Should be s[--i] or s[i-1] with proper index handling. Also, post-decrement logic is flawed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Printing address of s[i] instead of its value due to incorrect use of & operator. Should print s[i-1] before decrementing or adjust logic accordingly.]
